case_title: CHARLES D. JONES CO. vs. ACTIONSOURCE, INC., A CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARLES D. JONES CO. AS TO DEFENDANT ACTIONSOURCE, INC., A CORPORATION RONDIO, TOM DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-29-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-28-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-09-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-29-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-29-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FTA, FTC. HEARING SET FOR APR-28-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-01-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-01-1994, TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR JUL-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-01-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525. PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANTS. HEARING SET FOR AUG-30-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF CHARLES D. JONES CO.

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-28-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-28-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-01-1994 CONTINUED FROM APR-28-1994 TO JUN-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
